div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the President of the Council of the League of Nations (Hymans)
div.p: The President has directed me to advise you that he has designated the Honorable Henry Morgenthau as his personal representative who is prepared to proceed as soon as practicable to carry out his proffer of good offices and personal mediation in the matter of Armenia. The President, however, is still awaiting advices from the Council of the League as to the avenues through which his proffer should be conveyed and the parties with whom his representatives should get in contact, as well as assurances that he may count upon the diplomatic and moral support of the principal powers represented on the Council of the League.
